name: Cemedine Co., Ltd.
summary: Cemedine Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells glues, sealing materials, adhesives, special paints, coating materials, and processed goods based on adhesives in Japan. The company's products include elastic, epoxy resin, instantaneous, solvent based, second generation acrylic, emulsion, hot melt, peelable, and automobiles adhesives. In addition, it undertakes construction and contract works related to bonding, waterproofing, and other such functions. The company was founded in 1923 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan. Cemedine Co., Ltd. is a subsidiary of Kaneka Corporation.
